detail.signInPrompt: Sign in with the Google account you use in {{game}} to see your progress.
detail.noTracking: We don't track web progress for this game yet. Check back later!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: {{gameName}} does not collect personal data directly. The following third-party services are used in the game and may collect data under their own terms.

levelPlay.name: Unity LevelPlay (ironSource)
levelPlay.desc: Ad mediation platform. Serves ads from ad networks (including Unity Ads) and collects your device's advertising ID.

googlePlay.name: Google Play Games Services
googlePlay.desc: Saves your game progress to the cloud (Saved Games), linked to your Google account.

firebase.name: Google Firebase
firebase.desc: Receives a copy of your save data (Cloud Firestore) and signs you in with your Google account (Firebase Authentication) so you can view your progress on this website.

privacy.saveDataDesc: Your game progress is saved to the cloud in two ways: via Google Play Games (Saved Games), linked to your Google account, and a copy is written to Google Firebase (Cloud Firestore). When you sign in with your Google account on this website, we read the Firebase copy to show your progress.
privacy.advertisingDesc: Ads are served through the Unity LevelPlay (ironSource) mediation platform, which uses your advertising ID. To opt out, go to Settings → Google → Ads on your device.
privacy.purchasesDesc: In-app purchases use Unity's IAP package and are processed through Google Play Billing. Google may retain your purchase history.
privacy.deletionIntro: Your game progress is stored both in Google Play Games (Saved Games) and in Firebase. You can delete each:
privacy.deletionGpgsStep1: Open the Google Play Games app and go to its settings
privacy.deletionGpgsStep2: Under "Your Data" → "Delete individual game data", find {{gameName}}
privacy.deletionWebDesc: If {{gameName}} shows your progress on this site, sign in with your Google account, open it, and click "Delete my data".
privacy.deletionOutcome: Deleting the Firebase copy removes the progress shown here; if you keep playing, the game may re-sync it. Deleting your Google Play Games data removes the cloud save linked to your account. Advertising data resets under Settings → Google → Ads.
privacy.deletionContact: If your game isn't shown here, or to request full deletion, email us:
privacy.selectGame: Select a game to view its privacy policy

privacyWeb.title: Privacy Policy
privacyWeb.intro: This policy explains how the BrothersInGames website handles your data. The site lets you view and delete your game progress — it doesn't sell or share your data, and uses no analytics or advertising. Each game collects its own data in-app; see the game-specific policies at the bottom of this page.

firebase.name: Google Firebase
firebase.desc: Signs you in with your Google account (Firebase Authentication) and stores the copy of your game progress (Cloud Firestore) that this site reads. Each game uses its own Firebase project.

github.name: GitHub Pages
github.desc: Hosts this website. GitHub may process technical data such as your IP address and request logs in order to serve the pages.

privacyWeb.signInDesc: To show your progress, the site signs you in with your Google account via Firebase Authentication. When you sign in, we receive your name, email address, profile picture and account ID, used only to identify you and load your save data. Because each game has its own Firebase project, you sign in (and out) separately for each game on its page.
privacyWeb.saveDataDesc: After you sign in, the site reads a copy of your save data from Google Firebase (Cloud Firestore) and shows it to you. The site only reads this copy — your progress is written by the game, not by the website.
privacyWeb.noTrackingDesc: This website uses no analytics, no advertising, and no tracking cookies. (Ads or purchases that appear inside the games are covered by each game's own privacy policy.)
privacyWeb.deletionDesc: You can delete the copy of your progress shown here at any time: sign in, open your game, and click "Delete my data". This removes the Firebase copy; if you keep playing, the game may sync it again. For anything else, email us below.
privacyWeb.gamesDesc: Each game collects its own data in-app (cloud save, ads, purchases). See the policy for each game:

profile.title: My progress
profile.subtitle: Sign in with the Google account you use in the game to see your progress.
profile.signInPrompt: Sign in with the Google account you use in Def the Base to view your progress.
profile.loadError: Couldn't load your data. Please try again later.
profile.empty: We couldn't find any saved progress for this account. Open the game, sync your progress, and come back. (Make sure it's the same Google account you use in the game.)
profile.deleteConfirm: Really delete your web profile? This removes the saved progress shown on the web for this account. Your in-game and Google Play data are not affected and will re-sync next time.
